title: matricaria atrata
intro: Matricaria atrata, also known as bitter chamomile, is a perennial plant species within the daisy family that has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Matricaria atrata include its ability to reduce anxiety and insomnia, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate menstrual cramps, among other uses. Matricaria atrata can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
